narrative:
Twinsburg Twp B (precinct in Summit County) has 908 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.8 percentage points.
